---
title: Introduction to Computer Programming
---

## Contents

1. [Machine Language](01 Machine Language.qmd)

2. [Programming Languages](02 Programming Languages.qmd)

3. [Programming Paradigms](03 Programming Paradigms.qmd)

4. [Why Python?](04 Why Python.qmd)

5. [Integrated Development Environments (IDEs)](05 Integrated Development Environments.qmd)

6. [Scratch vs. Python](06 Scratch vs Python.qmd)

7. [Python Primer](07 Python Primer.qmd)

8. [Subprograms](08 Subprograms.qmd)

9. [Operators](09 Operators.qmd)

10. [Identifiers and Reserved Words](10 Identifiers and Reserved Words.qmd)

11. [Comments](11 Comments.qmd)

12. [Primary Control Constructs](12 Primary Control Constructs.qmd)

13. [Program Flow](13 Program Flow.qmd)
